function requestDraw(bytes32 productDrawId, string productName, uint32 ticketsRegistered, uint32 ticketsSold) external returns (uint256 requestId)
function getRequestId(bytes32 productDrawId) external view returns (uint256)
function getRandomWords(uint256 requestId) external view returns (uint256[])
function requestFulfilled(uint256 requestId) external view returns (bool)
function requestDrawIds(uint256 requestId) external view returns (bytes32)
function drawRequestIds(bytes32 productDrawId) external view returns (uint256)

function drawRecords(bytes32 productDrawId) external view returns (string productName, uint32 ticketsRegistered, uint32 ticketsSold, uint256 randomWord, uint32 winnerTicketIndex, uint32 winnerTicketNumber, bool fulfilled)
event DrawRandomnessRequested(bytes32 indexed productDrawId, uint256 indexed requestId, address indexed requester, string productName, uint32 ticketsRegistered, uint32 ticketsSold)
event DrawRandomnessFulfilled(bytes32 indexed productDrawId, uint256 indexed requestId, uint256 randomWord, uint32 winnerTicketIndex, uint32 winnerTicketNumber)
